reason: ADR.md Round 1 (15 ADRs) covers all load-bearing decisions across runtime (001), module layering (002), parallelism (003), atomic write (004), cross-process locking (005), circuit breaker (006), TTL cache (007), CLI (008), config freeze (009), schema versioning (010), subprocess hardening (011), secret redaction (012), threat model (013), fault-injection gating (014), and dependency layering (015). Each ADR carries Status / Context / Decision / Consequences / Alternatives considered; module names, env-var names, exit codes, regex patterns, and threat IDs are consistent with the upstream SAD §2.1 / §2.4 / §4 / §6 and SRS FR-01..FR-05 / NFR-01..NFR-10. Coverage of the five gaps from the previous B-2 SAD review (Makefile verify-system, CRG 3-6 directories, store 5-NFR bound, SAB placeholder)
